overall.description: A first-person walk through a cyberpunk waterfront promenade at night, passing neon-lit food stalls and approaching a graffiti-covered bench with seated NPCs. The wet pavement reflects the city lights from towering skyscrapers in this clearly video game footage (Cyberpunk 2077 aesthetic).

events.description: begins walking forward past red neon-lit food stalls
moving past the dense stall area into more open promenade space

agents.ego_description: walking along wet pavement past cyberpunk food stalls with red neon lighting

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket walking ahead on the left
pedestrian in white shirt walking ahead in center path

entered.detail: cyberpunk food vendor stall with red neon lights and graffiti-covered walls
towering illuminated corporate skyscrapers with glowing windows
palm trees lining the left side of the promenade
rain-slicked concrete reflecting neon lights and city glow

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a cyberpunk waterfront promenade at night, with the camera moving past food stalls illuminated by red neon lights. Two pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction, while towering skyscrapers loom in the distant background. The wet pavement creates reflective surfaces for the vibrant neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with city skyline view

events.description: food stalls recede completely, revealing open waterfront space
continuing straight approach toward distant graffiti-covered bench

agents.ego_description: walking along the open waterfront walkway with unobstructed view of the city skyline

entered.detail: metal safety railing along the water's edge
long yellow and green bench covered in stickers and spray paint graffiti
tall modern street lamps illuminating the walkway

segments.scene_description: Moving beyond the vendor area, the scene opens into a wide waterfront promenade with the camera approaching a distant bench. The skyline of illuminated skyscrapers dominates the view ahead, while palm trees line the left side. The walkway is empty except for the distant bench that becomes more prominent as the camera advances.

scene_state.functional_zone: seating area with graffiti-covered benches under overpass

events.description: slowing while approaching seated NPCs on the bench
trash containers temporarily block view while passing

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing two seated NPCs on a graffiti-covered bench, observing the cyberpunk characters

notable_agents.action: bald male with sunglasses, silver jacket, yellow pants and bright red shoes sitting on bench
female with pink hair styled in buns, white corset top, and red pants sitting on bench

entered.detail: concrete support wall with Chinese characters '天下无双' and spray paint art
overflowing trash and recycling bins next to the bench

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and passes a graffiti-covered bench where two distinctive cyberpunk characters are seated—a bald man in a silver jacket and a woman with pink hair. The setting is beneath an elevated concrete structure with trash containers positioned between the bench sections. After passing the seated NPCs, the view opens toward a plaza area with graffiti-covered walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a cyberpunk waterfront promenade that transitions from a crowded neon marketplace into a desolate urban plaza. It begins by gliding past food stalls bathed in red neon light, where the wet pavement reflects the glow of towering skyscrapers looming in the distance. As the camera moves beyond the vendor area, the scene opens into a wider walkway lined with palm trees, shifting the focus toward a solitary bench set against the illuminated city skyline. The camera then approaches and passes this graffiti-covered bench, revealing a bald man in a silver jacket and a pink-haired woman seated beneath an elevated concrete structure. Finally, the view expands past the seated figures and nearby trash containers toward an open plaza defined by graffiti-covered walls.
